violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food items found on the floor. Food should be stored at least 6 inches off of the ground/floor.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Hand washing sink was not provided with paper towels. Hand washing sinks should be provided with paper towels.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. Hand washing sink was not provided with garbage receptacle. Hand washing sinks must be provided with a waste receptacle.
